# terrible_community_general_svc (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the service to manage.

### Optional

- `downed` (Boolean) Should a `down` file exist or not, if it exists it disables auto startup. Defaults to `false`. Downed does not imply stopped.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the service is enabled or not, if disabled it also implies `state=stopped`. Take note that a service can be enabled and downed (no auto restart).
- `service_dir` (String) Directory `svscan` watches for services.
- `service_src` (String) Directory where services are defined, the source of symlinks to `service_dir`.
- `state` (String) `started`/`stopped` are idempotent actions that do not run commands unless necessary. `restarted` always bounces the svc (svc -t) and `killed` always bounces the svc (svc -k). `reloaded` sends a sigusr1 (svc -1). `once` runs a normally downed svc once (svc -o), not really an idempotent operation.
